The hallucinated Apple Inc. payload has been effectively purged. Nanjing Xingge Technology Co., Ltd. perfectly embodies the 'System Integration & Engineering Shell' archetype common in Chinese software parks. Officially tagged as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer', the entity claims to manufacture a staggering array of heavy hardware: smart instruments, wearable devices, networking equipment, environmental protection machinery, and HVAC systems. Supported by 1 Million RMB in paid-in capital, this entity acts as an asset-light EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) bidding proxy. It bids on municipal or commercial building intelligence projects (like installing CCTV, HVAC, and networks), acting as a middleman that purchases the necessary equipment (routers, cameras) and outsources the actual physical installation and manufacturing.
